name: Chicken Loreli
recipeIngredient: 4 Yams, cut into chunks; leave whole
recipeInstructions:
1. In an oven casserole, place the chicken.
2. Pour rum over the chicken and let sit for 10 minutes.
3. Sprinkle with thyme.
4. Pour in water.
5. Place yams around the chicken.
6. Sprinkle yams and chicken with cinnamon.
7. Toss in raisins.
8. Sprinkle all with ginger and brown sugar.
9. Cover and cook at 350 degrees for 1/2 hour.
10. Uncover and check that gravy is covering the meat. Add water as necessary.
11. Dot yams with butter or margarine.
12. Re-cover and cook another 1/2 hour or until yams are tender.
